contents:
[package]
name = "upower_dbus"
version = "0.3.2"
authors = [ "Michael Murphy <mmstick@pm.me>",]
repository = "https://github.com/pop-os/dbus-settings-bindings"
description = "a dbus client (using zbus) for upower"
readme = "README.md"
license = "MIT"
categories = [ "os::unix-apis",]
keywords = [ "linux", "systemd", "logind", "dbus", "zbus",]
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
serde_repr = "0.1.20"

[dev-dependencies]
futures = "0.3.31"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = [ "derive",]

[dependencies.zbus]
version = "5.11.0"
